metadata.title: Lyme Vaccine Development Awareness Dashboard
metadata.public_summary: Public Lyme vaccine development awareness dashboard seeded from a funnelgram image and designed as a source-backed evidence map. The dashboard tracks candidate stage, platform, population, route, evidence records, source provenance, and priority evidence gaps. Records are for research scoping and public awareness only; they are not clinical or policy guidance.
metadata.source_image_note: Initial candidate list transcribed from the funnelgram image supplied by the user. Current source-backed status may differ from the image; discrepancies are flagged in candidate notes.
metadata.clinical_use_disclaimer: For public awareness, evidence surveillance, and research planning only. Do not use for clinical decisions, investment decisions, regulatory conclusions, or patient-specific guidance without reviewing original sources and official recommendations.
metadata.repository_data_model: Static GitHub Pages site: index.html loads a JSON source of truth; CSV exports support review and reuse; scripts validate data and optionally run source surveillance.

candidates.population: Children 5 to 17 years; adults 18+ years; source-backed current population is age 5+ in pivotal trial reporting
candidates.dashboard_status_text: Topline Phase 3 VALOR results reported; companies state regulatory submissions are planned. No approved human Lyme vaccine is currently available.
candidates.image_status_text: Phase 3 trials completed and ongoing; marketing planned for 2026
candidates.status_discrepancy: The image states marketing planned for 2026. Current public sources support Phase 3 completion and planned regulatory submissions, not an approved/marketed 2026 product.
candidates.tags: OspA; phase 3; VALOR; regulatory submissions; pediatric; adult; high-incidence regions

candidates.population: Adults 18 to 70 years in Phase 1/2 trial; source-backed pipeline currently lists Lyme disease vaccine programs in Phase 2
candidates.dashboard_status_text: Moderna's pipeline lists both Lyme vaccine programs, mRNA-1975 and mRNA-1982, as Phase 2 as of May 28, 2026.
candidates.status_discrepancy: The image captures the earlier Phase 1/2 completion note. Current Moderna pipeline page lists the programs as Phase 2.
candidates.tags: mRNA; phase 2; dose-ranging; adult; immunogenicity; safety

candidates.candidate: Bavarian Nordic Lyme disease vaccine candidate
candidates.dashboard_status_text: Early-stage pipeline asset; most recent public financial materials indicate clinical development is now expected in 2027.
candidates.status_discrepancy: Image and older 2025 company materials said planned 2026. Bavarian Nordic's Q1 2026 material says the Lyme and EBV early-stage assets are now expected to enter clinical development in 2027.
candidates.tags: early-stage; preclinical; timeline change; 2027; travel health portfolio

candidates.manufacturer: Blue Lake Biotechnology; CyanVac; Immuno Technologies collaboration noted in publication/press release
candidates.population: TBA; mouse preclinical studies to date
candidates.dashboard_status_text: Preclinical data in mice published in npj Vaccines and described by Blue Lake/CyanVac; no human Lyme clinical trial identified in the seed map.
candidates.tags: PIV5; intranasal; OspA; preclinical; mouse; durable response; mucosal immunity

candidates.population: TBA; preclinical mouse and human immune-cell relevance studies described
candidates.dashboard_status_text: Preclinical structure-guided antigen design work; no human Lyme clinical trial identified in the seed map.
candidates.tags: CspZ; recombinant protein; preclinical; structure-based design; antibody response

records.title: Pfizer and Valneva report topline Phase 3 VALOR results and planned regulatory submissions
records.key_finding: Topline VALOR reporting states more than 70% efficacy in individuals aged 5+ and planned regulatory submissions; first pre-specified analysis did not meet the stated statistical criterion because fewer Lyme cases accrued than anticipated.
records.evidence_signal: Most advanced human Lyme vaccine candidate; regulatory pathway is the key near-term watch item.
records.actionability: Track FDA/EMA/other submissions, advisory committee materials, labeling, dosing schedule, and post-approval recommendation process.
records.tags: VALOR; efficacy; Phase 3; regulatory submissions; OspA; age 5+

records.title: CDC Lyme disease vaccine page: no current vaccine; LB6V completed Phase 3; ACIP would develop recommendations if approved
records.population: Public; healthcare providers; potential future vaccine populations not yet recommended
records.key_finding: CDC states that a Lyme disease vaccine is not currently available; it describes LB6V as having recently completed Phase 3 human trials and notes that ACIP would develop recommendations if FDA approval occurs.
records.evidence_signal: Public health recommendation work is contingent on regulatory approval.
records.actionability: Monitor CDC/ACIP agenda, FDA approvals, and public-facing education needs.
records.tags: CDC; ACIP; no current vaccine; public health guidance; LB6V

records.title: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for VALOR Phase 3 trial NCT05477524
records.population: Healthy children and adults in North America and Europe; age 5+ per sponsor reporting
records.key_finding: Registry record describes an efficacy, safety, tolerability, immunogenicity, and lot-consistency clinical trial of a 6-valent OspA-based Lyme vaccine for prevention of Lyme disease.
records.evidence_signal: Primary registry anchor for trial design and status.
records.actionability: Use registry fields for enrollment, sites, endpoints, arms, and last update in future automated refreshes.
records.tags: ClinicalTrials.gov; NCT05477524; VALOR; Phase 3; trial design

records.title: Valneva LB6V page summarizes Phase 3 efficacy signal and planned regulatory submissions
records.citation: Valneva R&D page, Lyme Disease — LB6V (VLA15)
records.population: Individuals aged 5 years and above per company summary
records.product_platform: Multivalent recombinant protein vaccine targeting six Borrelia OspA serotypes
records.key_finding: Valneva describes LB6V as the most advanced Lyme vaccine candidate and summarizes Phase 3 topline efficacy, tolerability, unmet statistical criterion in first analysis, and planned regulatory submissions.
records.evidence_signal: Company R&D page is a high-priority status source, but should be cross-checked against regulators.
records.actionability: Monitor press releases, filings, and regulator pages for confirmation of submission/approval milestones.
records.tags: Valneva; Pfizer; LB6V; VLA15; OspA; regulatory

records.title: Moderna pipeline lists Lyme disease vaccine programs mRNA-1975 and mRNA-1982 as Phase 2
records.population: Adults; next-phase population TBA in seed dashboard
records.key_finding: Moderna's pipeline page lists both mRNA-1975 and mRNA-1982 under Lyme disease vaccine programs in Phase 2.
records.evidence_signal: Moderna pipeline has advanced beyond the image's Phase 1/2 completion note.
records.actionability: Monitor ClinicalTrials.gov and Moderna pipeline updates for Phase 2 design, endpoints, sites, and dose selection.
records.tags: Moderna; mRNA-1975; mRNA-1982; Phase 2; mRNA

records.title: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for mRNA-1975/mRNA-1982 Phase 1/2 trial NCT05975099
records.key_finding: Registry record describes evaluation of safety and immunogenicity of heptavalent mRNA-1975 and monovalent mRNA-1982 against Lyme disease in adult participants.
records.evidence_signal: Registry anchor for Moderna's initial human Lyme vaccine program.
records.actionability: Track posted results, peer-reviewed outputs, and links to later Phase 2 trials.
records.tags: ClinicalTrials.gov; NCT05975099; Phase 1/2; adult; mRNA; safety; immunogenicity

records.title: IDWeek/Open Forum Infectious Diseases abstract reports interim Phase 1/2 safety and immunogenicity data
records.citation: Open Forum Infectious Diseases supplement abstract, 2026
records.population: Healthy adults 18 to 70 years of age
records.key_finding: Interim analysis abstract reported generally safe profiles with dose-dependent reactogenicity and immunogenicity after a 3-injection series, informing future trials.
records.evidence_signal: Early human safety/immunogenicity signal; detailed peer-reviewed publication/results posting still a watch item.
records.actionability: Monitor full results, dose selection, product selection, and adverse event details in subsequent publications or registry updates.
records.tags: IDWeek; safety; immunogenicity; reactogenicity; mRNA-1975; mRNA-1982

records.title: IDWeek/Open Forum Infectious Diseases abstract reports immunogenicity signal for mRNA Lyme candidates
records.citation: Open Forum Infectious Diseases supplement abstract, 2026
records.population: Healthy adults 18 to 70 years of age
records.key_finding: The abstract reports dose-dependent immunogenicity increasing with successive injections, supporting follow-on clinical development planning.
records.evidence_signal: Candidate-selection and dose-regimen decisions are central evidence gaps.
records.actionability: Add antigen-specific immune endpoints and dose arms when full data are available.
records.tags: immunogenicity; dose response; Phase 1/2; mRNA; OspA antigens

records.candidate: Bavarian Nordic Lyme disease vaccine candidate
records.title: Bavarian Nordic introduces early-stage Lyme disease vaccine program with clinical trials originally planned for 2026
records.citation: Bavarian Nordic 2024 Annual Report / March 2025 materials
records.key_finding: Company materials introduced Lyme disease as a new early-stage vaccine program and described progress toward clinical trials in 2026.
records.evidence_signal: Seed status aligned with the funnelgram image but superseded by later 2026 update.
records.actionability: Keep as provenance; do not use as current status without the Q1 2026 update record.
records.tags: Bavarian Nordic; early stage; planned 2026; historical status; superseded

records.candidate: Bavarian Nordic Lyme disease vaccine candidate
records.title: Bavarian Nordic Q1 2026 update moves Lyme early-stage clinical development expectation to 2027
records.key_finding: Bavarian Nordic's Q1 2026 materials state that Lyme and EBV early-stage assets are now expected to enter clinical development in 2027.
records.evidence_signal: Important discrepancy vs. the seed image and older 2025 materials.
records.actionability: Use this as current dashboard status until newer company or registry evidence appears.
records.tags: Bavarian Nordic; Q1 2026; 2027; timeline change; preclinical

records.title: Blue Lake/CyanVac press release summarizes preclinical PIV5-based intranasal Lyme vaccine data
records.citation: Blue Lake Biotechnology press release, February 15, 2024
records.key_finding: Company release states that mice inoculated with PIV5-based intranasal Lyme vaccine candidates had long-lasting neutralizing antibody responses and protection up to 15 months against multiple Borrelia burgdorferi strains.
records.evidence_signal: Preclinical durability and intranasal route are differentiating attributes; human translatability unproven.
records.actionability: Monitor IND/Phase 1 announcements and safety data for PIV5-vectored intranasal platform in humans.
records.tags: PIV5; intranasal; Blue Lake; CyanVac; preclinical; durable response

records.developer: Blue Lake Biotechnology and CyanVac; Immuno Technologies collaboration
records.title: npj Vaccines article: intranasal PIV5 vaccine protected mice against tick-transmitted Borrelia beyond one year
records.key_finding: Peer-reviewed article reports longer-lasting antibody responses and protection in mice after intranasal PIV5-delivered OspA vaccination compared with parenteral recombinant OspA control in the tested model.
records.evidence_signal: Peer-reviewed preclinical support; next gap is clinical translation.
records.actionability: Track IND status, Phase 1 initiation, shedding/safety considerations, route acceptability, and manufacturing scalability.
records.tags: npj Vaccines; PIV5; OspA; mouse; intranasal; durability

records.title: Tufts Now summary: engineered CspZ target shows promise in preclinical Lyme vaccine development
records.population: Mouse studies; human immune-cell relevance noted in university summary
records.key_finding: University summary describes CspZ as a promising Lyme bacterial protein target and notes engineered variants producing robust immune responses in preclinical studies.
records.evidence_signal: Alternative non-OspA antigen strategy may diversify the field.
records.actionability: Monitor translational funding, manufacturing process, adjuvant/route decisions, and IND-enabling studies.
records.tags: Tufts; CspZ; recombinant protein; preclinical; alternative antigen

records.title: Nature Communications article on structure-based design of CspZ-targeting Lyme vaccine
records.key_finding: Study reports structure-guided mutations of CspZ-YA variants that improved protective activity in mouse challenge models and supported antibody-recognition/stability analyses.
records.evidence_signal: Mechanistic preclinical support for a non-OspA antigen approach.
records.actionability: Add manufacturing, adjuvant, toxicology, dose regimen, and translational readiness data when available.
records.tags: Nature Communications; CspZ; structure-guided design; mouse challenge; preclinical

records.title: Seed image row: VLA15 by Pfizer and Valneva, recombinant protein, children 5-17 and adults 18+ years, IM, Phase 3
records.key_finding: Image states: Phase 3 trials completed and ongoing; marketing planned for 2026. Dashboard flags this as needing reconciliation with current source-backed status.
records.evidence_signal: Seed data only; useful for dashboard structure, not final public claims.
records.actionability: Cross-check image-derived status against source-backed records before publishing or outreach.
records.tags: seed image; VLA15; Pfizer; Valneva; status reconciliation

records.title: Seed image row: Moderna mRNA-1982 and mRNA-1975, adults 18-70, IM, Phase 1/2 completed in May 2025
records.key_finding: Image states: Phase 1/2 trial completed in May 2025. Dashboard current status uses Moderna pipeline Phase 2 record.
records.evidence_signal: Seed data captures previous milestone; current status requires updated source-backed record.
records.actionability: Retain as provenance and reconcile with current pipeline status.
records.tags: seed image; Moderna; mRNA; Phase 1/2; status reconciliation

records.title: Seed image row: Bavarian Nordic TBA candidate, to enter clinical trials in 2026
records.key_finding: Image states: to enter clinical trials in 2026. Dashboard flags later company material indicating 2027 expected clinical development.
records.evidence_signal: Seed data is superseded or at least conflicted by newer public source.
records.actionability: Publish current status only with the newer 2026 company report note.
records.tags: seed image; Bavarian Nordic; 2026 vs 2027; preclinical

records.title: Seed image row: Blue Lake Biotechnology and CyanVac PIV5-based vaccine, intranasal, preclinical
records.key_finding: Image states: preclinical PIV5-based vaccine by Blue Lake Biotechnology and CyanVac, intranasal route.
records.evidence_signal: Seed aligns with source-backed preclinical records.
records.actionability: Monitor for IND/clinical trial registration.
records.tags: seed image; PIV5; intranasal; preclinical

records.title: Seed image row: Tufts University CspZ-based recombinant protein vaccine, preclinical
records.key_finding: Image states: CspZ-based recombinant protein vaccine by Tufts University is preclinical.
records.evidence_signal: Seed aligns with source-backed preclinical records.
records.actionability: Monitor translational development and IND-enabling studies.
records.tags: seed image; CspZ; Tufts; recombinant protein; preclinical

records.title: CDC notes LYMERix was discontinued in 2002 and current vaccine protection from that product has waned
records.key_finding: CDC public page explains that the previously marketed U.S. Lyme vaccine was discontinued in 2002 and that people vaccinated before then are no longer protected.
records.evidence_signal: Public education should address vaccine history and current availability carefully.
records.actionability: Build FAQ content: no current human Lyme vaccine, historical LYMERix does not protect now, approval/recommendation steps remain pending.
records.tags: LYMERix; history; public awareness; vaccine confidence; CDC

gaps.gap: No FDA approval package, label, or ACIP recommendation is available for a current human Lyme vaccine in the seed dashboard.
No implementation guidance yet on target geography, seasonality, dosing logistics, insurance coverage, or public-program access.
Need updated post-Phase 3 public acceptability and healthcare-provider readiness evidence, especially in high-incidence regions.
Full peer-reviewed Phase 3 safety tables for LB6V are not represented in the seed data.
Need detailed Moderna Phase 1/2 and Phase 2 immunogenicity data by dose, antigen, age, baseline serostatus, and schedule.
Need peer-reviewed VALOR efficacy analysis with endpoints, confidence intervals, case accrual context, and subgroup analyses.
No human clinical trial registry record identified in seed data for PIV5-based intranasal, CspZ-based, or Bavarian Nordic Lyme candidates.
Need standardized side-by-side preclinical evidence fields: antigen, strain coverage, route, dosing interval, challenge model, durability, and correlates.
Need dashboard-friendly coverage of launch timing uncertainty and why regulatory approval does not automatically equal recommendation or availability.

method_sources.name: ClinicalTrials.gov
method_sources.search_or_monitor: Lyme Disease + vaccine; known NCT anchors NCT05477524 and NCT05975099; future query by condition, intervention, sponsor, and candidate names.
method_sources.automation: Weekly API polling can write candidate hits to updates/. Manual review required before records are promoted to the evidence map.

method_sources.name: PubMed / NCBI literature
method_sources.search_or_monitor: Lyme disease vaccine; LB6V; VLA15; mRNA-1975; mRNA-1982; PIV5; OspA; CspZ; Bavarian Nordic.
method_sources.automation: Weekly E-utilities search can capture new publications as unverified hits.

method_sources.name: Preprint and conference sources
method_sources.search_or_monitor: medRxiv, bioRxiv, conference supplements, IDWeek/Open Forum Infectious Diseases, and vaccine congress announcements.
method_sources.automation: Search terms captured in methods; automated classification should be labeled unverified.

method_sources.name: CDC / ACIP / FDA / EMA / Health Canada / NACI / UKHSA-JCVI
method_sources.record_type: Public health, regulatory, and recommendation sources
method_sources.search_or_monitor: Current availability, approvals, advisory committee agendas/minutes, labels, recommendations, and public communication materials.
method_sources.automation: Manual verification strongly recommended for regulatory and recommendation changes.

method_sources.name: Manufacturer and developer pages
method_sources.search_or_monitor: Pfizer, Valneva, Moderna, Bavarian Nordic, Blue Lake Biotechnology, CyanVac, Tufts University, and collaborators.
method_sources.automation: Scheduled source snapshots can flag timeline changes, candidate phase changes, and new trial announcements.

method_sources.name: General news and synthesis sources
method_sources.search_or_monitor: Reuters, CIDRAP, medical news outlets, and academic explainers for public understanding; not a substitute for official sources.
method_sources.automation: Use only for context after primary-source verification.
